diagrams.title: Python Installation Workflow for IoT
diagrams.description: A flowchart showing the sequential steps from downloading Python to setting up an IoT project environment
elements: Download Python (python.org) → Run Installer → Check 'Add to PATH' → Verify with 'python --version' → Install IDE (Thonny/VS Code) → Create Virtual Environment → Activate → Install IoT Packages (pip install) → Create Project
diagrams.purpose: Guides beginners through complete Python setup for IoT development without missing critical steps

diagrams.title: Virtual Environment Architecture
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how virtual environments relate to system Python and project folders
elements: System Python (/usr/bin/python3) → Global site-packages → Project A (venv_A: copy of python, local site-packages) → Project B (venv_B: copy of python, local site-packages) → Each venv has independent packages
diagrams.purpose: Visualizes isolation principle - each IoT project can use different package versions without conflicts

diagrams.title: pip Package Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how pip interacts with PyPI and the local system to install Python packages
elements: User runs 'pip install package' → pip queries PyPI (pypi.org) → PyPI returns package metadata → pip downloads package + dependencies → pip installs to site-packages → Package available for import in Python scripts
diagrams.purpose: Helps understand package resolution and installation process for IoT libraries
